_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for cws-neoclaw — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk's manifesto declares.
_node_url: NODE_URL is the govd node's base url: your LOCAL node (http://127.0.0.1:5773) or a FLEET node's address (its tailnet IP:5773, from your fleet config — NOT loopback). If you omit it the porter falls back to $GOVD_URL, else the local node.
